Alright, you're back for the next lesson. Thank you for getting honest. It isn't always a pleasant experience to say what something cost us in the past. It's just not and I appreciate that you are going through this but I promise the payoff is awesome. Just remember that when we get on to our timeline regression which is our NLP process, I'm going to really have you amplify that pain and the reason I have you do that is twofold. Number one, because when you amplify pain, when you really step into pain, it wakes up those memories and the deepest recesses of your unconscious mind and it makes the timeline regression infinitely more effective and that has been proven in the lab so it's crucial. And number two, just on a gut level thinking about it logically do, pain is the greatest motivator. I always say that it doesn't take a long time to change. In fact, change when you're ready, it happens in a moment. It happens in a heartbeat. What takes a long time though is you have to go through so much pain and suffering until you're just so fed up that you have the impetus to change. You're like, no, Maas, I can't take this anymore. I must change. When you're ready for that, when that shift finally occurs, bam, it happens in a heartbeat and once it does, you can soar to success having that new belief. So those two reasons together is why I'm going to have you amplify that pain but for right now, let's move on to the next step in the process which is to talk about the good side. Meaning, what would happen to your life? Imagine one year from now and then two and three years now. What would your life look like without this limiting belief? Just imagine what would happen if we remove this with the excise that out of your life and replace it with direct opposite, the empowering version. What impact would it have on your life in the next two to three years? Give me five specific outcomes here that would just make you say, you know, wow, and that would be just awesome. If my life was like that, bam, I would do almost anything to get there within reason. I want you to go now and write those five things down and really study them and step into them. Just imagine how great your life would be with this new belief and you're soaring to success. I'll see you in a few minutes.
